property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: /Users/wmazur/.sdkman/candidates/sbt/1.11.7/bin/sbt-launch.jar setCrossScalaVersions 3.8.4 ++3.8.4 -v mapScalacOptions ",REQUIRE:-source:3.8,-Wconf:msg=can be rewritten automatically under:s" ",-deprecation,-feature,-Xfatal-warnings,-Werror,MATCH:.*-Wconf.*any:e" clearCredentials excludeLibraryDependency com.github.ghik:zerowaste_{scalaVersion} com.olegpy:better-monadic-for_3 org.polyvariant:better-tostring_{scalaVersion} org.wartremover:wartremover_{scalaVersion} removeScalacOptionsStartingWith -P:wartremover moduleMappings runBuild 3.8.4 """{"projects":{"exclude":[],"overrides":{}},"java":{},"sbt":{"commands":[],"options":[]},"mill":{"options":[]},"tests":"full","migrationVersions":[],"sourcePatches":[{"path":"project/GalliaCommonSettings.scala","pattern":"val scala3 = \"3.3.1\"","replaceWith":"val scala3 = \"<SCALA_VERSION>\""}]}""" io.github.galliaproject%gallia-spark

testcase.name: basic spark (non gallia)
testcase.failure: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: getSubject is not supported at java.base/javax.security.auth.Subject.getSubject(Subject.java:277) at org.apache.hadoop.security.UserGroupInformation.getCurrentUser(UserGroupInformation.java:577) at org.apache.spark.util.Utils$.$anonfun$getCurrentUserName$1(Utils.scala:2416) at
